assertions.assertion: The response identifies the root cause as the API starting before IdentityServer is ready
assertions.rationale: Lists multiple possible causes but doesn't clearly identify the Aspire-specific root cause of startup ordering

assertions.assertion: The response recommends using .WaitFor(identityServer) on the API project in the AppHost
assertions.rationale: Only shows WithReference, does not mention WaitFor

assertions.assertion: The response recommends using .WithReference(identityServer) on the API project to make the endpoint URL available
The response mentions that IdentityServer needs health checks (e.g., MapHealthChecks or /health endpoint) for WaitFor to work
assertions.rationale: Does not mention health checks at all
